title: relay.rs: PeerGroupUpdate accepted from any MLS group member without admin check
description: daemon/src/relay.rs dispatch_notification BROADCAST arm handles ClearMessage::PeerGroupUpdate (lines 337-343) by calling dispatch_peer_group_update unconditionally. sender_pub_id is the MLS-authenticated sender, but no check is performed against the space's member roles — any group member can send a PeerGroupUpdate to add, remove, or change the role of any contact in any space_id. Compare with PeerRetract (lines 311-335) which checks store.message_sender_id to verify the sender owns the message. PeerGroupUpdate has no equivalent authorization check. A compromised or malicious peer can escalate their own role to admin, demote admins to member, or eject members from spaces without holding the admin role.
